member.name: P:Valaiorp.Planner.Models.PlanStep.AgentId
member.summary: Target agent ID for multi-agent delegation. When set, the MultiAgentOrchestrator dispatches this step as an AgentMessage to the named agent instead of executing it with a local tool.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.AutonomyAwarePlanner
member.summary: Wraps any IPlanner and applies autonomy-level gating before returning the plan. Set context.Metadata["autonomy.allowDynamicPlanning"] = true to enable dynamic step injection.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.CognitivePlanner
member.summary: Deliberative planner that runs three LLM passes: initial plan → self-critique → revision. Produces higher-quality plans at the cost of 2-3x more LLM calls. Inherits prompt construction and JSON parsing from LlmPlanner.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.LlmPlanner
member.summary: LLM-driven planner. Injects tool descriptions + RAG/memory context into the prompt, calls ILlmClient, and parses the JSON plan response. Subclass and override BuildSystemPrompt / ParsePlan to customise behaviour.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Planner.Planners.ManualPlanner
member.summary:
Executes a plan supplied directly as a Plan object or as a JSON string. No LLM, no code-authored planner — the caller owns the plan entirely.
Use cases: • Developer testing without an LLM • Replaying a logged plan from a previous run • Accepting an LLM-generated plan JSON from an external system • Integration tests with deterministic, file-based plans
